summary: read_search_in_tx rewritten to two-phase bit-KNN (top-K=64) + f32 rerank (vec_distance_l2). Single reader transaction preserved; ?1 bound once and reused across both phases. embedding_bin populated by Pack 1 ingest/migration is now load-bearing on the read path.
distance_rationale: Matches the pre-Pack-2 single-phase path's default L2 distance for float[] vec0 columns; preserves rank-order semantics for callers and for the AC-013b recall test.

ac_013b_recall_smoke_post_impl.note: recall=1.0 at N=10K reflects small-corpus bit-quantization preserving the full f32 top-10. Canonical-CI N=1M is the load-bearing recall measurement and is expected to remain >= 0.90 per ADR-0.7.0-vector-binary-quant § 2 point 4.

ac_020_smoke.note: AC-020 fails on this dev box both BEFORE and AFTER the P2-IMPL rewrite (verified by git stash sandwich). The bound is sequential/2 + small slack, so noisy dev-box CPU pegs the test. Not a hot-path regression introduced by P2-IMPL; canonical-CI runner is authoritative for AC-020.

next_step_for_orchestrator: spawn codex reviewer on P2-IMPL, then dispatch canonical-CI for budget lock-flip prep
